_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/Makefile.am.planningNote: Automake source-list fragment (libvsrc_la_SOURCES). C build system: digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5. The single hunk only deletes the vsrcdest.c and vsrcmdel.c entries — both themselves NO-COUNTERPART C-heap-free artifacts deleted in v41. No behavioral content.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrc.c.planningNote: IFparm VSRCpTable parameter-name table. digiTS keys params by name string (defineModelParams in dc-voltage-source.ts / ac-voltage-source.ts / variable-rail.ts); no integer-id IFparm table, no parser-driven generic ask/set, no IF_REDIRECT flag. Two hunks: h001 swaps the `sine`/`sin` alias rows so `sin` becomes canonical and `sine` becomes IOPR (IF_REDIRECT alias) — a parser-table redirect-flag edit; h002 changes the `external` param type IOP(...,IF_REALVEC) → IOP(...,IF_STRING) under #ifdef SHARED_MODULE and adds the RFSPICE port-parameter rows (portnum/z0/pwr/freq/phase) under #ifdef RFSPICE. Both hunks are parser-table plumbing; RFSPICE port params belong to S-parameter/RF analysis (not in analysis-scope.md). Resolved per hunk (both NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcacct.c.planningNote: VSRCaccept — the transient breakpoint-table pass. digiTS implements transient with a breakpoint controller (analysis-scope.md); the counterpart is AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep / nextBreakpoint (ac-voltage-source.ts:831-985). BUT the entire v41 rewrite targets ngspice's VSRCcoeffs[] / VSRCfunctionType / VSRCbreak_time waveform model, which digiTS does not carry (grep across src/ for VSRCcoeffs/functionType/VSRCbreak/newcompat/compatmode returns zero hits — digiTS reimplements waveforms as its own abstraction sine/square/triangle/sawtooth/expression/sweep/am/fm/noise). Ten hunks examined per hunk: the accessor-rename and C-plumbing hunks resolve directly; the PULSE/PWL/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM breakpoint-rewrite hunks target the absent VSRCcoeffs/break_time model and are blocked by reconstruction item vsrc#recon/waveformModel (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcacld.c.planningNote: VSRCacLoad — AC small-signal load. AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). digiTS already has stampAc on both AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl (ac-voltage-source.ts:723-746) and DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement (dc-voltage-source.ts:227-248). The single diff hunk mixes the new RFSPICE S-parameter port-stamp code (VSRCspinit/VSRCspupdate/VSRCgetActivePorts + the #ifdef RFSPICE branch of VSRCacLoad) with the plain #else AC-load path that adds the MODEACNOISE noise-input gate and renames the four matrix pointers ptr→Ptr. The RFSPICE additions belong to S-parameter analysis (not in analysis-scope.md); the #else path is the portable AC stamp. The hunk is split so the RFSPICE block is NO-COUNTERPART and the #else AC-load path is PENDING.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcask.c.planningNote: VSRCask — IFparm value getter for query parameters (current, power, port params). digiTS has no integer-id ask API; instance readouts are class members (getPinCurrents returns branch currents; there is no `power` query method on any voltage-source element — grep for VSRC_POWER/power query returns only the draw-label `power` of unrelated components). Two hunks: h001 adds a FREE(errMsg) leak fix + a CKTrhsOld-null guard on VSRC_CURRENT and fixes the VSRC_POWER sign (drops the leading unary minus so power = (Vpos-Vneg)*Ibranch); h002 adds the RFSPICE port-query cases (PORTNUM/Z0/PWR/FREQ/PHASE) and the SHARED_MODULE EXTERNAL no-op case. The C ask-getter has no digiTS counterpart (no integer-id ask path, no power-query method); resolved per hunk (both NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcdefs.h.planningNote: Instance/model structs + param-id constants. The digiTS counterpart is the instance-field set on the voltage-source element classes (dc-voltage-source.ts / ac-voltage-source.ts / variable-rail.ts) plus their model-param defs. Three hunks: h001 embeds `struct GENinstance gen` with accessor macros, marks node-id fields const, adds the RFSPICE port instance fields/pointers, and adds the portable new `double VSRCbreak_time` field (most-recent-breakpoint time — part of the v41 breakpoint-time waveform model digiTS lacks, blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel); h002 renames the five matrix-pointer fields ptr→Ptr (cosmetic; digiTS holds opaque solver handles); h003 reformats the function-type and device-parameter #defines into enums (byte-identical values), adds the Given-flags bitfields, the RFSPICE port fields, and the `struct GENmodel gen` embedding. Examined per hunk (h001 PENDING/blocked, h002/h003 NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcdel.c.planningNote: VSRCdelete. v41 rewrites it from a linked-list unlink (FREE(here)) into a per-instance C-heap free of VSRCcoeffs / trnoise_state / trrandom_state. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no instance linked list, and no VSRCcoeffs/trnoise_state/trrandom_state heap blocks (those are part of the ngspice waveform model digiTS does not carry). No behavioral content.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcdest.c.planningNote: VSRCdestroy — a C-heap free loop releasing every VSRCmodel and VSRCinstance. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. The whole file is deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcext.h.planningNote: C extern-prototype header. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no prototype headers — signatures are TypeScript class members. The single hunk changes the VSRCdelete prototype signature, removes the VSRCdestroy/VSRCmDelete prototypes (the deleted C-heap functions), and adds the RFSPICE VSRCspupdate/VSRCgetActivePorts/VSRCspinit prototypes (S-parameter analysis, not in analysis-scope.md). No surviving declaration maps to a digiTS construct.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcfbr.c.planningNote: VSRCfindBr — branch-equation lookup/allocation by instance name. digiTS implements this as findBranchFor on every voltage-source element (dc-voltage-source.ts:197-205, ac-voltage-source.ts:657-665), calling ctx.makeCur when branchIndex is unallocated — the direct counterpart of CKTmkCur. The single hunk is solely the model/instance linked-list-walk accessor rename (model->VSRCnextModel → VSRCnextModel(model), here->VSRCnextInstance → VSRCnextInstance(here)); arithmetic and control flow unchanged.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcinit.c.planningNote: SPICEdev VSRCinfo registration dispatch struct, converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS registration is the DcVoltageSourceDefinition / AcVoltageSourceDefinition / VariableRailDefinition objects; method binding is the element classes. Reviewed per the PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note: the single hunk is the entire-struct reformat. Every surviving function-pointer assignment that was non-NULL in v26 stays non-NULL and points to the same handler; the only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions). No new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcload.c.planningNote: VSRCload — the transient/DC companion load + waveform evaluation. digiTS implements DC-OP and transient (analysis-scope.md); the matrix-stamp + RHS-write counterpart is the load() method on every voltage-source element (dc-voltage-source.ts:211-225, ac-voltage-source.ts:685-721, variable-rail.ts), already citing vsrcload.c line-for-line. BUT the waveform-evaluation switch (PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/AM/PWL/TRNOISE) is rewritten against ngspice's VSRCcoeffs[]/VSRCfunctionType model that digiTS does not carry (digiTS evaluates its own waveform abstraction in computeWaveformValue, ac-voltage-source.ts:101-256). Fourteen hunks examined per hunk: the matrix-stamp accessor/connectivity hunks resolve directly (PORT); the per-waveform value hunks (PULSE/SINE/SFFM/AM/PWL/TRNOISE rewrites, newcompat.xs phase handling) target the absent VSRCcoeffs model and are blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM); the RFSPICE PORT case is S-parameter (NO-COUNTERPART).

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcmdel.c.planningNote: VSRCmDelete — a C-heap free that unlinks a VSRCmodel and frees its instances. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. The whole file is deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcpar.c.planningNote: VSRCparam — instance parameter application. The counterpart is setParam / the constructor on the voltage-source elements (ac-voltage-source.ts:667-683, dc-voltage-source.ts:207-209). Nine hunks: h001/h005/h006 are cosmetic `switch(` → `switch (` whitespace + FALLTHROUGH comments; h002 adds GCC FALLTHROUGH comments to the VSRC_AC numValue switch; h003/h004 add the new pwl `r` repeat-coefficient validation (r<-0.5 disables repeat; buggy-input guard; r>=end_time fix) — part of the VSRCcoeffs PWL model digiTS lacks; h007/h008 add trnoise_state_free / tfree-before-reinit for `alter`-command state re-write (C-heap of the trnoise/trrandom state blocks digiTS does not carry); h009 adds the RFSPICE port-parameter cases. Resolved per hunk: whitespace/FALLTHROUGH hunks NO-COUNTERPART (C parser cosmetics with no digiTS counterpart), pwl-r hunks blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel, trnoise/trrandom-free hunks NO-COUNTERPART (C-heap), RFSPICE NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcpzld.c.planningNote: VSRCpzLoad — pole-zero load. Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md (ratified 2026-05-17) ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS (no PZ method on the AnalogEngine interface, no PZ engine file under src/solver/analog/, no PZ MCP tool). The whole file belongs to PZ analysis; the single hunk is the linked-list-walk accessor rename plus the matrix-pointer ptr→Ptr renames inside VSRCpzLoad.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcpzs.c.planningNote: VSRCpzSetup — pole-zero setup (TSTALLOC of the branch matrix cells for the PZ pass). Case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis per PLANNING.md §5: analysis-scope.md ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS. Both hunks (h001 accessor rename; h002 the five TSTALLOC ptr→Ptr renames) live wholly inside VSRCpzSetup, which exists only to allocate matrix cells for the PZ load pass.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrcset.c.planningNote: VSRCsetup + VSRCunsetup — branch-equation allocation, shorted-source check, and the four/five TSTALLOC matrix-cell allocations. digiTS implements this as setup() on every voltage-source element (dc-voltage-source.ts:180-195 / ac-voltage-source.ts:640-655 / variable-rail.ts), with the idempotent makeCur branch allocation and the four allocElement calls in vsrcset.c TSTALLOC order. Three hunks: h001 adds the new `here->VSRCbreak_time = -1.0` initial-breakpoint seed (part of the v41 breakpoint-time waveform model digiTS lacks — blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel) plus the model/instance accessor rename; h002 adds the RFSPICE port-mode TSTALLOC branch (S-parameter) and renames the four non-RFSPICE TSTALLOC pointers ptr→Ptr (the portable four-cell allocation); h003 rewrites VSRCunsetup branch-equation cleanup (C-side dispatch glue — branch deallocation) with the RFSPICE resNode cleanup. Resolved per hunk.

src/spicelib/devices/vsrc/vsrctemp.c.planningNote: VSRCtemp — the per-instance AC-magnitude/phase derivation (VSRCacReal/VSRCacImag = VSRCacMag·cos/sin(radians)) plus the DC/transient value-presence warnings. digiTS implements DC-OP/transient/AC (analysis-scope.md); the VSRCacReal/VSRCacImag computation is done inline in stampAc (ac-voltage-source.ts:743-745) from _acMagnitude/_acPhase with the vsrctemp.c:39/42 default-1/default-0 guards (ac-voltage-source.ts:599-602). Two hunks: h001 adds the RFSPICE port-count reset/locals (S-parameter) plus the model/instance accessor rename; h002 rewrites the DC/transient value warnings (downgrades to ERR_INFO, adds the `dc value used for op instead of transient time=0 value` comparison that reads VSRCcoeffs[0]/[1] by function type) and adds the large RFSPICE port-processing block (Z0/freq/power/phase derivation, VSRCportCount bookkeeping, port reordering). The acMag/acPhase derivation is the portable core; the value-presence warnings read the absent VSRCcoeffs model; the RFSPICE block is S-parameter. Resolved per hunk.

vsrc/Makefile.am#h001.rationale: Automake source-list fragment — a C build-system artifact (PLANNING.md §5 case (a)). digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. The hunk only deletes the vsrcdest.c and vsrcmdel.c entries from libvsrc_la_SOURCES; both files are themselves NO-COUNTERPART C-heap-free artifacts deleted in v41. No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrc.c#h001.rationale: IFparm VSRCpTable alias-row edit: the `sine` and `sin` rows are swapped so `sin` is now the canonical IOP row for VSRC_SINE and `sine` becomes IOPR (the IF_REDIRECT alias macro) redirecting onto the same id. digiTS keys parameters by name string (waveform property + defineModelParams), has no integer-id IFparm table, no parser-driven generic ask/set, and no IF_REDIRECT flag. Parser-table plumbing only per PLANNING.md §5 case (a) — no parameter added/removed, no default changed.

vsrc/vsrc.c#h002.rationale: IFparm VSRCpTable edit: changes the SHARED_MODULE `external` row type IF_REALVEC → IF_STRING (a parser-table type-flag edit on a SHARED_MODULE-only param), and adds the #ifdef RFSPICE port-parameter rows (portnum/z0/pwr/freq/phase). digiTS has no IFparm table and no IF_STRING flag; the RFSPICE port params belong to S-parameter / RF analysis, which is not in analysis-scope.md (only DC-OP, transient, AC are implemented). Parser-table plumbing + non-implemented-analysis params per PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b). No behavioral content for an implemented analysis.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h001.rationale: Adds `#include "ngspice/compatmode.h"` so VSRCaccept can read the global `newcompat` compatibility-mode struct. C include directive per PLANNING.md §5 case (a): digiTS has no preprocessor and no ngspice global newcompat struct (grep for compatmode/newcompat across src/ returns zero hits). The newcompat.xs phase-handling it enables is part of the VSRCcoeffs waveform model handled under vsrc#recon/waveformModel; the include itself has no digiTS counterpart.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h002.rationale: Removes the file-local `#define SAMETIME(a,b)` and `#define TIMETOL 1e-7` macros from VSRCaccept (the v41 breakpoint rewrite no longer uses the SAMETIME ULP-equality test). C-preprocessor macro definitions per PLANNING.md §5 case (a). digiTS's acceptStep does carry its own SAMETIME/TIMETOL constants (ac-voltage-source.ts:858-859), but those belong to digiTS's own breakpoint mechanism; the v41 macro removal is C-preprocessor plumbing for the rewritten ngspice break model handled under vsrc#recon/waveformModel. No standalone behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h003.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep (ac-voltage-source.ts:831-970), the model/instance iteration site and the non-transient early-return. digiTS iterates per element instance; the ngspice VSRCnextModel/VSRCnextInstance linked-list walk has no per-element counterpart, but the surrounding MODETRAN|MODETRANOP gate maps to acceptStep's `if (!atBreakpoint) return` / waveform-class early-returns. The hunk is solely the accessor rename inside the model/instance walk; arithmetic and control flow unchanged.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h004.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep, the PULSE-branch local declarations and TD/TR/TF/PW/PER/PHASE extraction (ac-voltage-source.ts:851-868). The v41 hunk replaces the XSPICE #ifdef phase block with a `newcompat.xs` runtime branch and adds the `tmax`/`PHASE`-as-pulse-count locals, reading TD..PER from here->VSRCcoeffs[2..6]. digiTS's acceptStep derives these from frequency/phase/riseTime/fallTime rather than VSRCcoeffs[]. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the VSRCcoeffs-indexed PULSE locals do not exist on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h005.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep, the PULSE breakpoint-scheduling body (ac-voltage-source.ts:851-901). The v41 hunk replaces the v26 SAMETIME-based four-region breakpoint logic with the new VSRCbreak_time-gated `wait`-until-next-region scheme (compute time-in-period, pick the next region boundary, set break_time = CKTtime + wait − CKTminBreak). digiTS's square-wave acceptStep still uses the v26 SAMETIME four-region logic. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the VSRCbreak_time field and the rewritten PULSE break scheme target the ngspice VSRCcoeffs/break-time model digiTS does not carry (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h006.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep, PWL breakpoint scheduling. The v41 hunk rewrites the PWL case to the VSRCbreak_time-gated scheme with the new pwl-repeat (VSRCrGiven/VSRCrBreakpt/VSRCrdelay) handling, scanning here->VSRCcoeffs[i] for the next time point. digiTS has no PWL waveform at all (computeWaveformValue has no `pwl` case; the waveform enum is sine/square/triangle/sawtooth/expression/sweep/am/fm/noise) and no VSRCcoeffs. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — PWL is an absent ngspice waveform sub-feature (IN-class reconstruction per device-class-scope.md; Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h007.rationale: Fixes a spelling typo in a C source comment (`tansient` → `transient`) above the TRNOISE case and adds one blank line inside the TRNOISE case. Pure source-comment / whitespace change per PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact. No code, no preprocessor directive, no behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h008.rationale: TRNOISE source-waveform breakpoint arm of VSRCaccept: the VSRCbreak_time-gated `break_time += TS` sample scheduling and the RTS (random-telegraph-signal) shot-noise capture/emission scheduling reading state->RTScapTime/RTSemTime/RTSCAPT/RTSEMT. This is the trnoise_state noise subsystem, which is out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trnoise_state lifecycle (trnoise_state_init/_get/_free, f_alpha 1/f synthesizer, RTS trap state machine) is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives, not trnoise_state. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under vsrc#recon/waveformModel.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h009.rationale: TRRANDOM source-waveform breakpoint arm of VSRCaccept: the VSRCbreak_time-gated scheduling with TD initial-delay, reading state->TS/TD and calling trrandom_state_get(state). This is the trrandom_state noise subsystem, out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trrandom_state lifecycle (trrandom_state_init/_get) is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under vsrc#recon/waveformModel.

vsrc/vsrcacct.c#h010.rationale: Removes the `bkptset: ;` goto-label at the bottom of the VSRCaccept instance loop (the v41 PWL rewrite no longer `goto bkptset`). C goto-label control-flow plumbing per PLANNING.md §5 case (a): digiTS has no goto and no label; acceptStep returns directly. No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcask.c#h001.rationale: VSRCask IFparm value getter. The hunk adds a FREE(errMsg) leak fix and a CKTrhsOld-null guard to the VSRC_CURRENT case, and fixes the VSRC_POWER sign (drops the leading unary minus: power = (Vpos−Vneg)·Ibranch). digiTS has no integer-id ask API and no power-query method on any voltage-source element (grep confirms no VSRC_POWER / power-query path; getPinCurrents returns only branch currents). The C ask getter — including its DOING_AC error-message machinery (errMsg/errRtn/TMALLOC) — has no digiTS counterpart per PLANNING.md §5 case (a). No behavioral content for an implemented digiTS query surface.

vsrc/vsrcask.c#h002.rationale: VSRCask: changes the VSRC_POWER expression sign (continuation of h001) and adds the #ifdef RFSPICE port-query cases (PORTNUM/Z0/PWR/FREQ/PHASE) and the #ifdef SHARED_MODULE EXTERNAL no-op case. digiTS has no integer-id ask API; the RFSPICE port queries belong to S-parameter analysis (not in analysis-scope.md) and EXTERNAL/SHARED_MODULE is the C co-simulation shim. No digiTS counterpart per PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b).

vsrc/vsrcdefs.h#h001.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl instance fields (ac-voltage-source.ts:562-585). The portable body of this hunk is the new `double VSRCbreak_time` field (time of most-recent breakpoint). digiTS's acceptStep currently recomputes breakpoints statelessly (nextBreakpoint, ac-voltage-source.ts:758-815) and carries no break-time field; the VSRCbreak_time field is part of the v41 break-time-gated waveform model. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM). The GENinstance generic-struct embedding accessor macros, the `const` on VSRCposNode/VSRCnegNode, and the #ifdef RFSPICE port instance fields/pointers are C struct mechanics / S-parameter (no-counterpart) — see Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM and the RFSPICE roster.

vsrc/vsrcdefs.h#h002.rationale: Renames the five sparse-matrix-pointer fields VSRC{posIbr,negIbr,ibrPos,ibrNeg,ibrIbr}ptr → ...Ptr (capitalisation only). digiTS holds opaque solver handles (the _hPosBr/_hNegBr/_hBrNeg/_hBrPos fields from ctx.solver.allocElement, dc-voltage-source.ts:170-173), not raw double* matrix pointers. C struct field-name cosmetics per PLANNING.md §5 case (a). No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcdefs.h#h003.rationale: Reformats the function-type #defines (PULSE..EXTERNAL) and the device-parameter #defines (VSRC_DC..VSRC_EXTERNAL) into C enum blocks with byte-identical values, adds the Given-flags bitfield section trailer, the #ifdef RFSPICE port instance fields, and the `struct GENmodel gen` embedding with accessor macros. digiTS keys parameters by name string and has no integer-id enums, no GENmodel/model linked list, and no RFSPICE port fields (S-parameter analysis, not in analysis-scope.md). C struct + id-enum + RFSPICE mechanics per PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b). No value, parameter, or default change for an implemented digiTS construct.

vsrc/vsrcdel.c#h001.rationale: VSRCdelete rewrite — v41 changes it from a linked-list unlink (FREE(here)) into a per-instance C-heap free of VSRCcoeffs / trnoise_state / trrandom_state. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: digiTS is GC-managed; element instances drop by reference. No allocator, no destructor, no linked list, and no VSRCcoeffs/trnoise_state/trrandom_state heap blocks (these belong to the ngspice waveform model digiTS does not carry). No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcdest.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of VSRCdestroy — a C-heap free loop releasing every VSRCmodel and VSRCinstance. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. The file is deleted in v41.

vsrc/vsrcext.h#h001.rationale: C extern-prototype header — PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact. The hunk changes the VSRCdelete prototype signature (GENmodel*,IFuid,GENinstance** → GENinstance*), removes the VSRCdestroy/VSRCmDelete prototypes (the deleted C-heap functions), and adds the #ifdef RFSPICE VSRCspupdate/VSRCgetActivePorts/VSRCspinit prototypes (S-parameter analysis, not in analysis-scope.md). digiTS has no prototype headers; method signatures are TypeScript class members. No surviving declaration maps to a digiTS construct — no new parameter slot, no changed default, no new capability for an implemented analysis.

vsrc/vsrcfbr.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.findBranchFor (dc-voltage-source.ts:197-205) and the same method on AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl (ac-voltage-source.ts:657-665). VSRCfindBr looks up an instance by name and allocates its branch equation via CKTmkCur if unallocated; digiTS's findBranchFor calls ctx.findDevice(name) then ctx.makeCur. The hunk is solely the model/instance linked-list-walk accessor rename (VSRCnextModel/VSRCnextInstance macro form); arithmetic and control flow unchanged.

vsrc/vsrcinit.c#h001.rationale: SPICEdev VSRCinfo registration dispatch struct, converted to C99 designated initialisers. PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note + §5 case (a): digiTS has no SPICEdev table — registration is the DcVoltageSourceDefinition / AcVoltageSourceDefinition / VariableRailDefinition objects and method binding is the element classes. Reviewed per the glue note: every surviving function-pointer assignment that was non-NULL in v26 stays non-NULL and points to the same handler (VSRCparam, VSRCload, VSRCsetup, VSRCunsetup, VSRCpzSetup, VSRCtemp, VSRCfindBr, VSRCacLoad, VSRCaccept, VSRCdelete, VSRCask, VSRCpzLoad). The only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions). No new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h001.rationale: Adds `#include "ngspice/compatmode.h"` so VSRCload can read the global `newcompat` compatibility-mode struct for the PULSE phase handling. C include directive per PLANNING.md §5 case (a): digiTS has no preprocessor and no ngspice global newcompat struct. The newcompat.xs phase handling it enables is part of the VSRCcoeffs waveform model handled under vsrc#recon/waveformModel; the include itself has no digiTS counterpart.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h003.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.load PULSE-path local declarations (the V1/V2/TD/TR/TF/PW/PER + phase locals). The v41 hunk replaces the XSPICE #ifdef phase block with unconditional `double PHASE/phase/deltat` plus the new `tmax` local. digiTS reads V1/V2/period/riseTime/fallTime from its own params (computeWaveformValue square case, ac-voltage-source.ts:119-162) rather than VSRCcoeffs[0..7]. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the VSRCcoeffs-indexed PULSE locals do not exist on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h004.rationale: The hunk's sole v41-new content is the `newcompat.xs` compatibility-mode branch — ngspice's emulation of foreign SPICE dialects (PSPICE/LTspice/HSPICE/Spice2-3, ngspice/compatmode.h), gated by `set ngbehavior`/`.option`; it only changes the PULSE phase convention WHEN a compat flag is set. digiTS has no compat-mode system (no ngbehavior/.option parser, no newcompat global; grep across src/ = zero hits) and foreign-dialect emulation is out of scope for a browser logic-sim (user ruling 2026-06-02: NO-COUNTERPART). The non-compat baseline PULSE phase path is the portable one and lands via the coeff engine; the newcompat.xs branch has no counterpart.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h005.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue sine case (ac-voltage-source.ts:112-117) SINE-path local declarations. The v41 hunk de-#ifdefs the XSPICE PHASE/phase locals so the sine phase is always available (phase = PHASE·π/180). digiTS's sine case already takes an unconditional phase argument. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the SINE locals are read from VSRCcoeffs[] by VSRCfunctionOrder, which is part of the ngspice waveform model digiTS does not carry (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h006.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue sine case (ac-voltage-source.ts:112-117), the VO/VA/FREQ/TD/THETA extraction. The v41 hunk is part of de-#ifdef-ing the SINE phase handling (reads here->VSRCcoeffs[0..5] with VSRCfunctionOrder guards). digiTS reads amplitude/frequency/phase/dcOffset from its own params. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — VSRCcoeffs-indexed SINE extraction is absent from the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h007.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue sine case (ac-voltage-source.ts:112-117), the value formula. The v41 hunk collapses the XSPICE/non-XSPICE #ifdef so the SINE value is always VO + VA·sin(FREQ·time·2π + phase)·exp(−time·THETA) including the phase term (the non-XSPICE v26 path omitted +phase). digiTS already computes VO + VA·sin(FREQ·t·2π + phase) (the THETA damping is digiTS's `expression`/EXP-equivalent, absent for plain sine). Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the THETA-damped SINE and the VSRCcoeffs model are absent from the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h008.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue fm case (ac-voltage-source.ts:244-248) as the SFFM counterpart, SFFM-path local declarations. The v41 hunk de-#ifdefs the XSPICE PHASEC/PHASES phase locals. digiTS's `fm` waveform is a single-tone FM approximation, not the ngspice SFFM (VO + VA·sin(2π·FC·t + MDI·sin(2π·FS·t))) with carrier+signal phases read from VSRCcoeffs[]. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — SFFM with VSRCcoeffs is an absent ngspice waveform sub-feature on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h009.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue fm case (ac-voltage-source.ts:244-248), SFFM phase-radians conversion. The v41 hunk de-#ifdefs `phasec = PHASEC·π/180; phases = PHASES·π/180`. digiTS's fm case has no separate carrier/signal phase. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the SFFM VSRCcoeffs model is absent from the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h010.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue fm case (SFFM value, ac-voltage-source.ts:244-248) and am case (AM locals, ac-voltage-source.ts:238-242). The v41 hunk collapses the SFFM value formula #ifdef (always VO + VA·sin(2π·FC·t + phasec + MDI·sin(2π·FS·t + phases))) and de-#ifdefs the AM PHASEC/PHASES locals. digiTS's am/fm waveforms use a single modulation freq/depth/index and no VSRCcoeffs. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the SFFM/AM VSRCcoeffs model is absent from the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h011.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue am case (ac-voltage-source.ts:238-242), the AM VA/FC/MF/VO/TD + phase-radians extraction. The v41 hunk de-#ifdefs `phasec = PHASEC·π/180; phases = PHASES·π/180` for AM. digiTS's am case computes VO + (1 + depth·sin(2π·modFreq·t))·VA·sin(arg) with no per-tone phases and no VSRCcoeffs. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the AM VSRCcoeffs model is absent from the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h012.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — computeWaveformValue am case value (ac-voltage-source.ts:238-242) and the PWL case (absent in digiTS). The v41 hunk collapses the AM value #ifdef (always VA·(VO + sin(2π·MF·t + phases))·sin(2π·FC·t + phases)) and rewrites the entire PWL case to the new linear-search-with-repeat scheme reading here->VSRCcoeffs[i]/VSRCfunctionOrder/VSRCrGiven/VSRCrBreakpt/VSRCrdelay. digiTS has no PWL waveform and no VSRCcoeffs. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — PWL is an absent ngspice waveform sub-feature on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h013.rationale: TRNOISE source-waveform value arm of VSRCload: the `state->timezero` reset-on-jump-from-0 handling, the `TS == 0.0 || time == 0.0 → value = 0` guard, and the trnoise_state_get interpolation reading state->TS/RTSAM. This is the trnoise_state noise subsystem, out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trnoise_state lifecycle is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives, not trnoise_state. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under vsrc#recon/waveformModel.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h014.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.load (ac-voltage-source.ts:685-721), the tail of the waveform switch and the `loadDone` label removal. The v41 hunk adds the #ifdef RFSPICE PORT case (value += VSRCVAmplitude·cos(time·VSRC2pifreq), S-parameter — NO-COUNTERPART) and removes the `loadDone:` goto label (C control-flow plumbing). The portable residue is the switch-tail structure that digiTS's load() reproduces via computeWaveformValue's return. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the switch structure assumes the VSRCfunctionType dispatch digiTS does not carry; once the waveform model is rebuilt the label removal and switch-tail land as ordinary deltas (the RFSPICE PORT case stays NO-COUNTERPART). Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM.

vsrc/vsrcmdel.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of VSRCmDelete — a C-heap free that unlinks a VSRCmodel and frees its instances. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. The file is deleted in v41.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h001.rationale: Cosmetic C whitespace change to VSRCparam — `switch(param) {` → `switch (param) {` plus removal of the blank line after it. Pure formatting per PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact. digiTS's setParam is a string-keyed dispatch with no integer-id switch; no behavioral content in this hunk.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h002.rationale: Adds `/* FALLTHROUGH */` GCC-warning-suppression comments to the VSRC_AC `switch(value->v.numValue)` cascade (case 2 falls into case 1 falls into case 0) and a `switch(` → `switch (` whitespace edit. Pure C source-comment / fallthrough-annotation change per PLANNING.md §5 case (a): the underlying AC mag/phase-given cascade is unchanged. digiTS reads acMagnitude/acPhase directly from params (ac-voltage-source.ts:601-602) with hasModelParam guards; there is no numValue cascade. No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h003.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.setParam (ac-voltage-source.ts:667-683) PWL repeat-coefficient (`r`) handling. The v41 hunk adds the new VSRC_R param-validation guards: r < −0.5 disables repeat (VSRCrGiven = FALSE); a buggy-input guard when VSRCcoeffs is absent or VSRCfunctionOrder < 2; sets VSRCr/VSRCrGiven. digiTS has no PWL waveform, no `r` repeat coefficient, and no VSRCcoeffs. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — the PWL repeat model is an absent ngspice waveform sub-feature on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h004.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.setParam, the VSRC_R end-time validation. The v41 hunk changes the repeat-start-time guard from `VSRCr > end_time` to `VSRCr >= end_time` (reading end_time = VSRCcoeffs[VSRCfunctionOrder−2]) before the E_PARMVAL error. digiTS has no PWL `r` repeat coefficient and no VSRCcoeffs end-time. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel — part of the absent PWL repeat model on the v26 baseline digiTS lacks (Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM).

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h005.rationale: Cosmetic C whitespace change to the VSRC_D_F1 (distortion f1 input) case — `switch(value->v.numValue)` → `switch (value->v.numValue)`. Distortion is not implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md: no distortion engine file, method, or MCP tool); the VSRCdF1mag/phase distortion-input parameters have no digiTS counterpart. Pure formatting in a non-implemented-analysis case per PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b). No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h006.rationale: Cosmetic C whitespace change to the VSRC_D_F2 (distortion f2 input) case — `switch(value->v.numValue)` → `switch (value->v.numValue)`. Distortion is not implemented in digiTS (analysis-scope.md); the VSRCdF2mag/phase distortion-input parameters have no digiTS counterpart. Pure formatting in a non-implemented-analysis case per PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b). No behavioral content.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h007.rationale: Adds a `trnoise_state_free(here->VSRCtrnoise_state)` call before re-initialising the trnoise state on an `alter` command. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: this is an explicit C-heap free of the trnoise_state block (digiTS is GC-managed and carries no trnoise_state — the ngspice TRNOISE state model is absent, blocked separately under vsrc#recon/waveformModel where the state model is rebuilt). The free call itself has no digiTS counterpart. No behavioral content beyond C heap management.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h008.rationale: Adds a `tfree(here->VSRCtrrandom_state)` call before re-initialising the trrandom state on an `alter` command. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: explicit C-heap free of the trrandom_state block (digiTS is GC-managed and carries no trrandom_state — the TRRANDOM state model is absent). The free call itself has no digiTS counterpart. No behavioral content beyond C heap management.

vsrc/vsrcpar.c#h009.rationale: Adds the #ifdef RFSPICE VSRC_PORTNUM/PORTZ0/PORTPWR/PORTFREQ/PORTPHASE param-application cases (computing VSRCisPort, VSRCportZ0, VSRCVAmplitude, etc.). RFSPICE port parameters belong to S-parameter / RF analysis, which is not in analysis-scope.md (only DC-OP, transient, AC are implemented). PLANNING.md §5 case (b) non-implemented analysis. No counterpart in any digiTS voltage-source element.

vsrc/vsrcpzld.c#h001.rationale: Pole-zero load (VSRCpzLoad). PLANNING.md §5 case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis: analysis-scope.md (ratified 2026-05-17) ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS — no PZ method on the AnalogEngine interface, no PZ engine file under src/solver/analog/, no PZ MCP tool. The whole file belongs to PZ analysis; the single hunk is the linked-list-walk accessor rename plus the matrix-pointer ptr→Ptr renames inside the dc-source-shorted and ac-source-diagonal branches of VSRCpzLoad.

vsrc/vsrcpzs.c#h001.rationale: Pole-zero setup (VSRCpzSetup) — model/instance accessor rename inside the branch-equation allocation loop. PLANNING.md §5 case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis: analysis-scope.md ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS. VSRCpzSetup exists solely to CKTmkCur a branch and TSTALLOC the matrix cells for the PZ load pass; the whole function belongs to PZ analysis.

vsrc/vsrcpzs.c#h002.rationale: Pole-zero setup (VSRCpzSetup) — the five TSTALLOC matrix-cell allocations renamed ptr→Ptr. PLANNING.md §5 case (b) whole non-implemented SPICE analysis: analysis-scope.md ratifies PZ as not implemented in digiTS. The allocations exist only for the PZ load pass; no digiTS counterpart.

vsrc/vsrcset.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.setup (ac-voltage-source.ts:640-655) and dc-voltage-source.ts setup() (dc-voltage-source.ts:180-195). The portable content is the model/instance accessor rename inside the setup loop and the existing shorted-source guard (VSRCposNode == VSRCnegNode); both digiTS setups already implement the idempotent makeCur branch allocation. The new `here->VSRCbreak_time = -1.0` initial-breakpoint seed is part of the v41 break-time-gated waveform model digiTS lacks — blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel. Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM.

vsrc/vsrcset.c#h003.rationale: VSRCunsetup — branch-equation deallocation (CKTdltNNum) cleanup, rewritten to `if (VSRCbranch > 0) CKTdltNNum(...); VSRCbranch = 0;` plus the #ifdef RFSPICE resNode cleanup. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact: VSRCunsetup is C-side dispatch glue for explicit branch-equation deallocation; digiTS handles element/branch lifecycle implicitly via the GC'd element lifecycle (no unsetup method on AnalogElement, no explicit CKTdltNNum). The RFSPICE resNode cleanup is S-parameter (analysis-scope.md). No behavioral content for a digiTS construct.

vsrc/vsrctemp.c#h001.rationale: VSRCtemp top-of-function: adds the #ifdef RFSPICE `ckt->CKTportCount = 0; int* portIDs; int prevPort;` port-bookkeeping locals plus the model/instance accessor rename. The RFSPICE port-count bookkeeping belongs to S-parameter / RF analysis (not in analysis-scope.md). The accessor rename is C linked-list-walk plumbing with no per-element digiTS counterpart (digiTS computes per instance). The portable acMag/acPhase derivation in VSRCtemp is unchanged by this hunk and lives in h002's surrounding context. PLANNING.md §5 cases (a)/(b). No behavioral content for an implemented analysis in this hunk.

vsrc/vsrctemp.c#h002a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — the VSRCacGiven default guards in AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl (acMag default 1, acPhase default 0; ac-voltage-source.ts:599-602 / :940-941). Portable sub-item of the vsrctemp.c#h002 split: the acMag/acPhase default-fill block (VSRCacGiven && !VSRCacPGiven → acPhase=0). Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel (the VSRCcoeffs-backed AC-coeff layer; Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM); the default-fill itself maps onto the existing derivation as a confirm/no-op.

vsrc/vsrctemp.c#h002b.rationale: Frozen sub-item of the vsrctemp.c#h002 split: the v41 transient-time-0 DC value-warning rewrite. The v26 `if(!VSRCdcGiven){...}` ERR_WARNING block is replaced with `if(!VSRCdcGiven && !VSRCfuncTGiven){ ERR_INFO 'DC 0 assumed' } else if(VSRCdcGiven && VSRCfuncTGiven && !TRNOISE && !TRRANDOM && !EXTERNAL){ time0value=(AM||PWL)?VSRCcoeffs[1]:VSRCcoeffs[0]; if(!AlmostEqualUlps(time0value,VSRCdcValue,3)) ERR_INFO 'dc value used for op instead of transient time=0 value' }`. This is diagnostic-only with zero numerical effect (no matrix/RHS perturbation), it reads the VSRCcoeffs model, and it emits through the SPfrontEnd IFerrorf/ERR_INFO warning channel — which digiTS does not have (grep over ac-voltage-source.ts = zero IFerrorf/ERR_INFO/'DC 0 assumed'/'time=0 value'). NO-COUNTERPART (user ruling 2026-06-02): the ERR_INFO 'DC 0 assumed' rewrite is a diagnostic-only front-end warning with no SPfrontEnd channel in digiTS and no numerical effect.

vsrc/vsrctemp.c#h002c.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — the AC magnitude/phase derivation used in AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc (VSRCacReal/VSRCacImag = VSRCacMag·cos/sin(VSRCacPhase·π/180), ac-voltage-source.ts:743-745 / :1310-1312). Portable sub-item of the vsrctemp.c#h002 split: the bijective `radians = VSRCacPhase·π/180; VSRCacReal = VSRCacMag·cos(radians); VSRCacImag = VSRCacMag·sin(radians)` block. Blocked by vsrc#recon/waveformModel (the VSRCcoeffs-backed AC-coeff layer; Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM); the derivation itself is the portable core (applies onto the existing stampAc derivation as a confirm/no-op).

vsrc/vsrctemp.c#h002d.rationale: Frozen sub-item of the vsrctemp.c#h002 split: the #ifdef RFSPICE port-processing block (VSRCisPort/portZ0/portFreq/VAmplitude/portY0 derivation, the CKTportCount/CKTrfPorts bookkeeping, the port-reorder bubble sweep, and the second model/instance sweep checking port indexing) plus the trailing `return(OK)`. RFSPICE port processing belongs to S-parameter / RF analysis, which is not in analysis-scope.md (only DC-OP, transient, AC are implemented). PLANNING.md §5 case (b) non-implemented analysis. No counterpart in any digiTS voltage-source element.

vsrc/vsrcacld.c#h001a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc (ac-voltage-source.ts:723-746) and src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.stampAc (dc-voltage-source.ts:227-248). The portable content (the #else, non-RFSPICE path) is the MODEACNOISE noise-input gate (acReal/acImag = 1/0 when this instance is ckt->noise_input, else the VSRCacReal/VSRCacImag values) plus the four ±1 incidence stamps (renamed ptr→Ptr) and the two RHS writes (CKTrhs += acReal, CKTirhs += acImag). digiTS already stamps the four ±1 cells and writes acMag·cos / acMag·sin into rhsRe/rhsIm in stampAc; the MODEACNOISE noise-input gate is the new behavioral content to port. The split removes the RFSPICE block (VSRCspinit/VSRCspupdate/VSRCgetActivePorts + the #ifdef RFSPICE acLoad branch), which is NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter analysis).
vsrc/vsrcacld.c#h001a.rationale: RFSPICE VSRCspinit/VSRCspupdate/VSRCgetActivePorts + #ifdef RFSPICE acLoad branch. S-parameter analysis not implemented (vsrc-review.md §1 / §5 split 1).

vsrc/vsrcacld.c#h001b.rationale: The only digiTS-absent content of this #else AC-load hunk is the MODEACNOISE noise-input gate (acReal/acImag = 1/0 when this instance is ckt->noise_input). digiTS has no small-signal .noise analysis — zero MODEACNOISE bit in ckt-mode.ts (bits stop at MODEUIC 0x10000), no ckt->noise_input designation, no noise driver — so the gate has no counterpart (user ruling 2026-06-02: NO-COUNTERPART; .noise out of analysis-scope). The hunk's other content (the four ±1 incidence stamps + the CKTrhs/CKTirhs writes of acMag·cos/acMag·sin) is ALREADY present and isomorphic in AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc / DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.stampAc (verified by the parallel-run verifier); the noise gate is the sole delta and it is out of scope.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h002a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.load (dc-voltage-source.ts:211-225), AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.load (ac-voltage-source.ts:685-721), and variable-rail.ts load(). The portable content (the #ifndef RFSPICE branch) is the four ±1 matrix-incidence stamps renamed ptr→Ptr, immediately followed by the existing MODEDCOP|MODEDCTRANCURVE dc-value gate. digiTS already issues exactly these four stamps via solver.stampElement on the cached _hPosBr/_hNegBr/_hBrPos/_hBrNeg handles. The #ifdef RFSPICE port-stamp branch (VSRCisPort g0 admittance stamp into posPos/negNeg/posNeg/negPos) is removed by the split as NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter). Only the field-name (ptr→Ptr) rename is portable here; arithmetic unchanged.

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h002b.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.load (dc-voltage-source.ts:211-225), AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.load (ac-voltage-source.ts:685-721), and variable-rail.ts load(). The portable content (the #ifndef RFSPICE branch) is the four ±1 matrix-incidence stamps renamed ptr→Ptr, immediately followed by the existing MODEDCOP|MODEDCTRANCURVE dc-value gate. digiTS already issues exactly these four stamps via solver.stampElement on the cached _hPosBr/_hNegBr/_hBrPos/_hBrNeg handles. The #ifdef RFSPICE port-stamp branch (VSRCisPort g0 admittance stamp into posPos/negNeg/posNeg/negPos) is removed by the split as NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter). Only the field-name (ptr→Ptr) rename is portable here; arithmetic unchanged.
vsrc/vsrcload.c#h002b.rationale: #else RFSPICE VSRCisPort g0-admittance port-stamp branch. S-parameter analysis not implemented (vsrc-review.md §5 split 2).

vsrc/vsrcload.c#h002c.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.load (dc-voltage-source.ts:211-225), AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.load (ac-voltage-source.ts:685-721), and variable-rail.ts load(). The portable content (the #ifndef RFSPICE branch) is the four ±1 matrix-incidence stamps renamed ptr→Ptr, immediately followed by the existing MODEDCOP|MODEDCTRANCURVE dc-value gate. digiTS already issues exactly these four stamps via solver.stampElement on the cached _hPosBr/_hNegBr/_hBrPos/_hBrNeg handles. The #ifdef RFSPICE port-stamp branch (VSRCisPort g0 admittance stamp into posPos/negNeg/posNeg/negPos) is removed by the split as NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter). Only the field-name (ptr→Ptr) rename is portable here; arithmetic unchanged.

vsrc/vsrcset.c#h002a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.setup TSTALLOC sequence (dc-voltage-source.ts:191-194), AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.setup (ac-voltage-source.ts:651-654), variable-rail.ts setup(). The portable content (the #else / non-RFSPICE path) is the four TSTALLOC matrix-cell allocations renamed ptr→Ptr: VSRCposIbrPtr(posNode,branch), VSRCnegIbrPtr(negNode,branch), VSRCibrNegPtr(branch,negNode), VSRCibrPosPtr(branch,posNode) — digiTS already allocates exactly these four cells in this order via ctx.solver.allocElement. The #ifdef RFSPICE port-mode branch (CKTmkVolt resNode + the eight port TSTALLOCs) is removed by the split as NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter). Only the field-name (ptr→Ptr) rename is portable; allocation order unchanged.
vsrc/vsrcset.c#h002a.rationale: #ifdef RFSPICE port-mode block (CKTmkVolt resNode + eight port TSTALLOCs). S-parameter analysis not implemented (vsrc-review.md §5 split 3).

vsrc/vsrcset.c#h002b.tsFunction: src/components/sources/dc-voltage-source.ts — DcVoltageSourceAnalogElement.setup TSTALLOC sequence (dc-voltage-source.ts:191-194), AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl.setup (ac-voltage-source.ts:651-654), variable-rail.ts setup(). The portable content (the #else / non-RFSPICE path) is the four TSTALLOC matrix-cell allocations renamed ptr→Ptr: VSRCposIbrPtr(posNode,branch), VSRCnegIbrPtr(negNode,branch), VSRCibrNegPtr(branch,negNode), VSRCibrPosPtr(branch,posNode) — digiTS already allocates exactly these four cells in this order via ctx.solver.allocElement. The #ifdef RFSPICE port-mode branch (CKTmkVolt resNode + the eight port TSTALLOCs) is removed by the split as NO-COUNTERPART (S-parameter). Only the field-name (ptr→Ptr) rename is portable; allocation order unchanged.

vsrc#recon/waveformModel.title: Rebuild the ngspice independent-source waveform model (VSRCfunctionType + VSRCcoeffs[] + VSRCfunctionOrder instance fields, the PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/PWL/AM/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM value evaluation in load(), the VSRCbreak_time-gated breakpoint scheduling in acceptStep, and the VSRCcoeffs-reading parameter application in setParam) as the v26 ngspice independent voltage-source layer
vsrc#recon/waveformModel.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-voltage-source.ts — rebuild the voltage-source waveform layer onto the ngspice independent-source model: (1) instance state — VSRCfunctionType (PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/PWL/AM/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM), VSRCfunctionOrder, the VSRCcoeffs[] coefficient array, VSRCbreak_time, and the trnoise/trrandom state — as fields on AcVoltageSourceAnalogImpl, replacing or backing the current digiTS waveform abstraction (sine/square/triangle/sawtooth/expression/sweep/am/fm/noise); (2) load() value evaluation — the v26 vsrcload.c per-VSRCfunctionType switch (computeWaveformValue rebuilt to the ngspice PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/PWL/AM/TRNOISE cases reading VSRCcoeffs[] by VSRCfunctionOrder); (3) acceptStep() breakpoint scheduling — the v26 vsrcacct.c VSRCaccept per-type breakpoint logic; (4) setParam() — the v26 vsrcpar.c VSRC_PULSE/SINE/.../R/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM coefficient-array application. The v26 baseline carries no newcompat.xs phase branch, no VSRCbreak_time field, and no RFSPICE ports — those are v41-new and apply onto the reconstructed v26 baseline as ordinary per-hunk deltas (the blocked hunks listed). NB: whether digiTS should rebuild on the ngspice VSRCcoeffs model or retain its own waveform abstraction is open question Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM — this reconstruction item presumes the device-class-scope IN rule (rebuild the complete v41 device) and is contingent on the user's resolution of Q-VSRC-WAVEFORM.
